identity.name: Zain
identity.tagline: Founder of ZCraft Studios. I build high performance Minecraft Resources and provide high quality minecraft services

about.comment: Passionate about writing clean, performant . Every Piece of work delivered with simple configs, full docs and real support.

mainProject.title: ZCraf Studios
mainProject.label: zcraft_studios | main project
mainProject.description: Premium minecraft development studio. Every resource ships with modern GUI systems, deep config, PlaceholderAPI support, and active maintenance. Used across 100+ servers worldwide.

projects.name: Minecraft Community Hub
projects.summary: Production-ready Minecraft server website with admin dashboard, Discord OAuth, forums, ban appeals, SEO, email system, and live chat bridge. Fully configurable via .env — no code editing required.

review.text: Saved us weeks of work. The admin panel and Discord integration work flawlessly out of the box.

projects.name: Evidence Case Bot
projects.summary: Discord-native staff case management system with Forum threads, auto-tagging, appeal tracking, dual SQLite + JSON storage, and full audit logs — all via slash commands. Every case gets a unique ticket ID.

review.text: Finally a proper evidence system. No more messy spreadsheets — everything is tracked, tagged, and logged automatically.

commissions.intro: I also Help with configs, server setups, and websites. Reach out on Discord with your brief.

items.title: Commission resources
items.desc: Private and public resources built for creators, minigames, and network systems.

reviews.text: Amazing work, was available most of the day and very quick.

items.title: Servers Worked On
items.desc: Setup, balancing, optimization, and long term maintenance for live servers.

reviews.text: TPS went from 14 to a stable 20. Night and day.

items.title: Web Projects
items.desc: Websites, docs portals, and frontend work supporting server brands.

contact.intro: Need a custom website? Custom server setup? Let's talk. Hit me on Discord for the fastest reply, or check out the store on BuiltByBit.
